name: MIxS Host-Associated
description: GSC MIxS host-associated environment checklist fields

fields.label: Host (Common Name)
fields.name: host_common_name
fields.helpText: Common name of the host organism (MIxS: host_common_name)

fields.label: Host Scientific Name
fields.name: host_scientific_name
fields.helpText: Scientific name of the host organism (MIxS: host_scientific_name)

aiValidation.prompt: A scientific species name in Latin binomial format. Should be two words in italics-style format like 'Homo sapiens', 'Mus musculus', 'Arabidopsis thaliana'.

fields.label: Body Site
fields.name: host_body_site
fields.helpText: Body site where sample was collected (MIxS: host_body_site)

fields.label: Host Sex
fields.name: host_sex
fields.helpText: Sex of the host organism (MIxS: host_sex)

fields.label: Host Age
fields.name: host_age
fields.helpText: Age of the host organism at sampling (MIxS: host_age)

fields.label: Host Disease Status
fields.name: host_disease_stat
fields.helpText: Disease status of the host (MIxS: host_disease_stat)

fields.label: Host Height
fields.name: host_height
fields.helpText: Height of the host organism (MIxS: host_height)

fields.label: Host Weight / Body Mass
fields.name: host_body_mass
fields.helpText: Body mass of the host organism (MIxS: host_body_mass)
